title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: MARY GILKEY CITY LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. 416 Ferry Street Dayton, OR 97114 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-5:30pm, Tuesday 9am-noon, Thursday 1:30pm-5:30pm (503) 864-2221 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 864-2221 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARY GILKEY CITY LIBRARY
